title: centaurea hellwigii
intro: Centaurea hellwigii, also known as the Hungarian mayweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory agent to reduce swelling and ease pain. The plant's extracts have been shown to have various health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against cell damage and infections. The herbal preparations of Centaurea hellwigii, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
